programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician tried unsuccessfully to revive a man's wife who he found covered in blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Where There's Water There's a Way

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Mountaintop Ambition

programme.desc: When the ranch comes under fire from encroaching hunters, Gabe takes it upon himself to learn to ride a horse as the family constructs a fence around the property. And later, Gabe and Raquell leave the mountain for the birth of their baby girl.

programme.title: Expeditions to the Edge: No Turning Back
programme.desc: After crossing the North Pacific, the Infinity arrives in Dutch Harbor. Unprepared for the arctic, the crew uses this opportunity to stock up on supplies and ready the boat before making their way into the mouth of the treacherous North West Passage.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: France: Survivalists Passing In The Night

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Category Five Survival
programme.desc: A category five hurricane blasts through the camp of Amal, an Iraqi war refugee now living in Iowa and her partner, Duke. In addition to the hurricane, the pair also endures venomous spiders, insects, and nocturnal predators in the swamps of Florida.

programme.desc: Budding entrepreneurs are given the chance to make their business dreams come true and become successful or even wealthy. But the entrepreneurs must first try to convince five tough, multi-millionaire tycoons to fund their ideas.

programme.title: Jay Leno's Garage: Top Ten: Military and Service Vehicles
programme.desc: Jay celebrates the vehicles and people who protect or at least play them on TV. He puts out a raging fire at an airport and learns how to land a U2 aircraft. Then Jay hits the road with the Ghostbuster car and checks out some Batmobiles.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program

programme.title: American Greed: Biggest Cons: Billionaire Boys Bust
programme.desc: John Bravata uses free lunch seminars to lure 440 middle class victims into his $50 million real estate investment scam. He is now serving 20 years, but his son may be plotting a crooked comeback.

programme.title: Street Signs
programme.desc: A one hour view into Europe's equity session, providing price discovery, the street's view, instant analysis and a link to the business stories trending online and on social, breaking down key economic data in Europe.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: Tow Fetish
programme.desc: A married couple who turned $20,000 in savings into a multi-million dollar towing empire; two best buds who cashed in on the green rush and are now living the high life; a teacher from Atlanta who traded reading and writing for roofing and riches.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: Money Grows on Trees
programme.desc: A Washington D.C. man who went from driving other people’s limos to kicking back in his own. Also, a roofing prodigy snagged his first million while his friends were still in school. Plus, an enterprising arborist learns that money does grow on trees.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: The Flooring King
programme.desc: A grade school dropout who built a multi-million dollar flooring business; a die-hard dredger who makes a fortune moving earth underwater; and a demolition diva whose love of pink has her painting the town red.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: Married With Gators
programme.desc: A junkyard giant who went from living in an old clunker to making millions selling them; a fed-up mom who turned her family's messes into a thriving furniture business; and husband-and-wife alligator hunters who transform cold-blooded killers into cash.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: I'll Never Tire of It
programme.desc: A salesman who left his retirement to build a multi-million dollar tire empire; a second-generation builder who overcame a family tragedy and created a financial triumph; and two best friends who turned a dusty old printer into a nine-figure cash machine.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: Reap What You Sew
programme.desc: A migrant farmhand went from working in the fields to cultivating his own empire. A married couple have spun alpaca wool into solid gold. Plus, an aspiring rock star who wound up finding his fortune in industrial curtains instead of the music business.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: A Whole Can of Worms
programme.desc: Meet a California couple who literally wormed their way to wealth. Also, a South Florida man goes from HVAC technician to HVAC titan. Plus, a college dropout traded a silver spoon for a pile of junk and made millions.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: Soldier of Fortune
programme.desc: An Idaho man whose custom tow trucks haul in millions a year; an oil-and-gas expert who uses her mineral-mining know-how to pump out big profits; and a former Marine whose moving company has made him a true soldier of fortune.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: The Millionaire Chimney Sweep
programme.desc: A musician turned chimney sweep who’s cleaning up big-time; a Hawaiian couple whose high-end ukuleles bought them their own island paradise; and a former janitor who went from shining floors to shipping petroleum – and made millions.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: Smells Like Money
programme.desc: A man struck it rich in the oil business without ever finding a drop of oil. A taxidermist has turned big game into big bucks. Plus, an immigrant who came to American and found a wealth of opportunity in waste disposal.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: Just Killin' It
programme.desc: Meet a Texas man who makes a killing cleaning up stuff that can kill you, an exterminator who squashes bugs all the way to the bank and a couple who have made a fortune glitzing up the grimy tattoo industry.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: Through the Roof
programme.desc: Meet a small-town roofer who hustled his way to a high net worth. Also, a landscaper grew her part-time mowing job into a multi-million dollar lawn care legacy. Plus, an Indian immigrant turned fifty bucks and a dream into a service station empire.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: A mechanic from inner-city L.A. found a way to capitalize on underground car culture. Also, a father-son team have turned forest fires into a million-dollar flooring business. Plus, a manufacturing mogul went from segregated classrooms to boardrooms.

programme.title: Blue Collar Millionaires: Trash to Cash
programme.desc: Meet a concrete pourer who's gone from sleeping in a shack to kicking back in a mountaintop mansion, a young woman who's turned her childhood love of horses into a seven-figure empire and two best friends who throw away junk.

programme.title: Jay Leno's Garage: Even Tougher
programme.desc: In this dirt-spraying, rubber-burning, water-splashing episode, Jay and his friends push various purpose-built vehicles to their limits. Jay takes Matt LeBlanc into the hills in one of the first off-road vehicles of all time.

programme.title: Jay Leno's Garage: In Pursuit of Perfection
programme.desc: Jay checks out vehicles that come close to being perfect. He treats Jon Hamm to a drive down memory lane and they end up cruising in Jay's Mercedes Gullwing. Then Jay and Fabio talk Italian style while cruising in Fabio's Lamborghini.

programme.title: Jay Leno's Garage: Road Trip
programme.desc: Jay explores what it takes to have an unforgettable road trip. He goes off roading with Kelly Clarkson, recreates a 100 year old time trial in a 100 year old car with Billy Gardell and surprises fellow comedian Craig Ferguson with a blast from his past.

programme.title: Jay Leno's Garage: You are What You Drive
programme.desc: Jay takes a drive with ZZ Top frontman Billy Gibbons in one of his newest, most rock-and-roll hot rods. Jay then reminds Rob Corddry of various phases in his life in the recurring segment 'This is Your Automotive Life!'

programme.title: Jay Leno's Garage: All Play and No Work
programme.desc: Former Dirty Jobs host Mike Rowe gets to live out his childhood fantasy of driving the actual car from The Rockford Files. Jay takes stunt driver and off-road badass Jolene Van Vugt to the desert to test out Polaris super fun Razor.

programme.title: The Loud House: Really Loud Music
programme.desc: Luna contemplates whether she should go with a song that's true to her sound, or try to make something that the whole world will love just to win a song writing contest.

programme.title: The Loud House: Pulp Friction/ Pets Peeved
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde submit an Ace Savvy comic to a meet-the-creator contest, but are foiled by a surprising nemesis. When Lana brings home a new pet, who the kids adore, the four original Loud pets scheme to get rid of him.

programme.title: The Loud House: Study Muffin/ Homespun
programme.desc: The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.title: The Loud House: Don't You Fore-get About Me/ Tough Cookies
programme.desc: Hit by the realization that her big sister will be going off to college soon, Leni tries to thwart Lori's plans. Lincoln and Clyde start their own cookie-making business, but realize it's a lot more work than they realized.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: Porcupines Rock High Tops
programme.desc: Grab your shutter shades and peep these kicks. Two mystery celebs are hiding behind 3D animated filters. Darci Lynne Farmer, Gabrielle Navaeh and Lex Lumpkin ask questions and gather clues to unveil our special guests.

programme.title: Group Chat With Jayden and Brent: Sleepover and Duck Duck Poop
programme.desc: Jayden Bartels and Brent Rivera join forces to play outrageous sleepover games, slap food on someone's face, and share hilarious stories with Danger Force stars Havan Flores and Terrence Little Gardenhigh.

programme.title: Movie: Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: After stealing a dollar from his girlfriend's child, a minor league hockey player is ordered to fill the role of the Tooth Fairy. While bumbling through the process, he rediscovers his childhood dreams and learns how to follow his heart.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross' Tan
programme.desc: Rachel and Joey nervously anticipate their first real 'date;' Ross gets a spray-on tan, but fails to follow the simple directions properly.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Cake
programme.desc: On Emma's first birthday, Rachel convinces Monica and Chandler to stay for her party.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-Sits
programme.desc: Despite Ross' protests, Rachel agrees to let her self-indulgent sister baby-sit baby Emma.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross's Grant
programme.desc: Ross must apply to a Nobel prize winning scientist for a palaeontology grant.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Home Study
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler get a visit from the adoption agency and learn that Joey once dated their case worker. Ross gets Rachel to face her fear of swings by facing his fear of spiders.

programme.title: Mom: Nietzsche and a Beer Run
programme.desc: Christy is tempted by her old vices when she dates an attractive, hard-partying man. Meanwhile, Bonnie decides her advice is worth money and becomes a life coach.

programme.title: Mom: Jail Jail and Japanese Porn
programme.desc: When Christy puts her new relationship ahead of friends and family, Bonnie has to pick up the slack.

programme.title: Mom: Sonograms and Tube Tops
programme.desc: Christy plans a baby shower for Violet, who is nervous about becoming a mom. Meanwhile, Bonnie scores a new life-coaching client.

programme.title: Mom: Toilet Wine and the Earl of Sandwich
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie help Regina tie up loose ends on the way to drop her off at prison. Meanwhile, Alvin spends the day getting to know his grandkids.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Nieces a New Media Room
programme.desc: The Lopez's home become full when his niece and her freeloading boyfriend move in.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Testi-Lies for Benny
programme.desc: When Benny's mother, lawyer and the judge all turn against her, it's up to George to keep her out of jail.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Helps Angie's Wha-Positive Self Image
programme.desc: When Angie gets concerned about losing her looks, George asks his gorgeous young niece to tone down her sex appeal.

programme.title: Full House: The Legend of Ranger Joe
programme.desc: Ranger Roy announces his retirement on Danny's show and Joey tries out for the position.

programme.title: Full House: The Volunteer
programme.desc: D.J.likes an elderly gentleman at a nursing home but discovers he has Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: Full House: Gotta Dance
programme.desc: Stephanie thinks she wants a career as a professional dancer; Rebecca wants a baby shower.

programme.title: Full House: Crushed
programme.desc: Stephanie is love struck when her favourite rock star, Tommy Page, shows up at her party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hall Monitor/ Jellyfish Jam
programme.desc: SpongeBob is the hall monitor at boating school; Bob takes a jellyfish home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandpappy the Pirate/ Cephalopod Lodge
programme.desc: With SpongeBob's help, Mr. Krab attempts to fool his granddad into thinking he's a pirate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Biddy Sitting/Jolly Lodgers
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Pluck-O-Matic/ Pups Save a Mascot
programme.desc: Yumi's new Robo-Corn Plucker goes haywire, and Ryder and the PAW Patrol must get it under control. Daring Danny X, dressed as a 'Bird X' mascot for the Adventure Bay, gets carried away by a couple of eagles who mistake him for one of their own.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Balloon Pups/ Pups Save the Spider Spies
programme.desc: Giant balloons have floated away from a parade and it's up to the pups to save the pup balloons, the parade and Mayor Humdinger. The Turbot cousins try to spot a rare spider but get stuck in its web.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Humsquatch / Pups Save a Far Flung Flying Disc
programme.desc: Travelling Travis yelps for help when he finds a mysterious creature in trouble. A robo-toy causes mayhem in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save an Antarctic Martian/Pups Save the Maze Explorers
programme.desc: Travelling Travis is on another great adventure when he lands in Antarctica but believes he's actually on Mars!

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Bears/ Pups Save a Farmerless Farm
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol must work quietly to save the sleeping bears. / All the farmers are out of town.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Skydivers/ Pups Save the Cupcakes
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway and Farmer Al are ready for a day filled with skydiving fun. Alex and the Mini Patrol get locked inside the flounder.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Dino Rescue: Pups and the Lost Dino Eggs
programme.desc: A lost world of Dinosaurs is discovered, Mayor Humdinger wants to take Dino Eggs back to Foggy Bottom.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Pterodactyl/ Pups and the Big Rumble
programme.desc: Maverick the daredevil Pterodactyl takes a tumble. A volcano is erupting, threatening the Dino Wilds.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Hum-Dino
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger finds himself on top of a runaway Brachiosaurus bound for Adventure Bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Robosaurus/ Pups Save a Film Festival
programme.desc: When a homemade Robotic Dino named Earl comes to life, the pups need to find him, stop him, and bring him home. The pups are shooting their Film Festival entry until Daring Danny X cuts the action with his dangerous stunt.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Ready, Race, Rescue
programme.desc: The pups are ready to be the pit crew for their race hero, The Whoosh! When the legendary racer is unable to drive in the championship race, he calls on Marshall to take the wheel and race in his place.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Clash of Triton
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants his friends and family to help celebrate King Neptune's birthday.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Appointment TV/ Karen's Virus
programme.desc: The long-lost episode of Mermaid Man is finally showing on TV, but SpongeBob may not make it home in time to watch. Karen gets a computer virus, and it's up to SpongeBob to get it out of her.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Retires/ Trident Trouble
programme.desc: Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he's still up to no good.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hello Bikini Bottom!
programme.desc: A concert promoter wants to send SpongeBob and Squidward on the road, until greedy Mr. Krabs decides to manage them and their 'world tour,' himself.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Mission: Relative Chaos

programme.title: The Loud House: Exchange of Heart/ Community Disservice

programme.title: Mayday: Cold Case

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Unidentified Flying Ozzy
programme.desc: Ozzy and Jack pack up a camper and travel to the home of all things UFO: Roswell, New Mexico. While Jack is a true UFO believer and loves camping, Ozzy is a skeptic and loathes the outdoors when it's freezing cold.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: The Last Two Samurai
programme.desc: Father and son set out on a historic Japanese Adventure. Driven by Ozzy's obsession with samurai swords, the guys go in search of a Samurai Master.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Sir Prince of Darkness
programme.desc: Ozzy and Jack's bucket lists collide when father and son head to the UK. While both want to visit Stonehenge, the mythic structure of Druid lore, the rest of their itinerary is up for debate, and both Ozzy and Jack each want their way.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Like Father, Like Sun
programme.desc: At their Key West starting point, Ozzy and Jack do some deep-sea fishing, hunt pythons in the Everglades and drive by Mar-a-Lago, President Trump's Winter White House.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Cuba or Busted
programme.desc: For more than 50 years, Cuba's been off limits for travellers coming from America, but now the doors are open, and Jack and Ozzy are heading to the country of revolution and cold war agitation to get a look at some history that's been hidden away.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Aloha, Osbournes
programme.desc: After completing their cross-country adventure, Ozzy and Jack thank wives Sharon and Lisa for holding down the fort in their absence with a trip to Kona, Hawaii, also known as the 'Big Island.'

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Twisted Sister
programme.desc: Ozzy tries to persuade Jack to hit the road but Jack's new baby is due to be born and he can't leave LA. Ozzy and Jack conspire to convince his sister, Kelly to take the wheel if Jack has to stay behind.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Texas, Bloody Texas
programme.desc: Jack and Ozzy are at odds over the broken RV, but they find a recreational way to let out their frustrations. Ozzy meets with a Texas-based Black Sabbath cover band, and the boys find themselves involved in a bizarre game of bingo.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Remember the Alamo?
programme.desc: In 1982, something happened at the Alamo that instantly became both rock 'n' roll lore and a bold question mark in the Osbourne family. Along the way the guys take a couple of detours, including NASA's Johnson Space Center.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Misters Osbourne Go to Washington
programme.desc: Ozzy agrees to go to one of Jack's favorite cities, as long as they'll be able to get a tour of the White House. So, while Jack scrambles to get access to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, he and his dad take a bunch of detours.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: To Nightmare Manor
programme.desc: The crew answers a call at a haunted house. While they search for the source of the fire, each of them is forced to confront their greatest fears.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: A Christmas Story
programme.desc: Lucy, Andy, Ike and Granny try to get Eddie into the Christmas spirit. Chief has a special gift that may just do the trick.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Eggman
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Everything's Just Rosie
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q, and Murr strike out with patrons in a bowling alley and try to force-feed unsuspecting diners. Plus, a surprise visit by Rosie O’Donnell has tonight’s loser seeing double.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: In Poor Taste Buds
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr take to the court to serve up some seriously personal tennis lessons and then head to the park for a bewildering game of Now! The loser must put his face through the ultimate test during a food presentation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 5
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No. Holds. Barred
programme.desc: It's getting hot and heavy as powerlifting besties battle a couple whose on and off status is ever evolving.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Grandmas Get Sauced
programme.desc: Grandmas with a serious drive to compete enter the Pepperdome to take on a pair of buddies who seem to have tongues of steel.

programme.title: The Misery Index: No One Told Sal
programme.desc: Find out what happens when your parachute doesn't open, when your new parent is a sex doll, and what makes Jameela hide behind her podium.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Chase vs. Julie
programme.desc: Contestants guess the misery of some traumatic real-life events for the chance at $30,000.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Voting
programme.desc: Adam explores the twisted history of the Electoral College, explaining that the Founding Fathers did not want most Americans to vote. He also takes a stab at fixing a political system that seems rigged against true democracy.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins College
programme.desc: Adam shares why becoming a dropout billionaire is unlikely and how school rankings have little to do with education quality. Plus, student loans.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Economy
programme.desc: Adam explains why doing taxes is unnecessarily complicated, the economic numbers we hear don't reveal much, and American manufacturing can't return.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Science
programme.desc: Testing mice means wasted resources because what works on them often fails on humans. Scarce funding stops scientists from seeking cures, and there's no money in reproducing results, even though it's essential in proving findings.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smushed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr give a security presentation that’s anything but safe, then hold hands with strangers in the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Doomed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr take in more than they bargained for while working at a tailor shop, then convince strangers to hand over their cellphones. Plus, tonight's big loser sacrifices his childhood for a punishment three months in the making.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: I Can't
programme.desc: Coach Taylor is urged by Big Mary to find a new way to lead his team. When Becky goes to Tim for help, Tami ends up in an uncomfortable position. Vince is forced to deal with a medical emergency involving his mother.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Injury List
programme.desc: Tami must defend her job and her actions when a parent asks for her termination as principal. Julie starts making plans for her future but a phone call throws her off track.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Laboring
programme.desc: Tensions in town run high as the Panthers-Lions game approaches. Coach must tell Luke he will not be playing in the big game and Tami must decide whether or not to make a public apology.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: The Taylors host a Thanksgiving dinner. Luke receives an offer that could take him away from the Lions. Tami makes a decision in regards to her career. Julie and Landry are visited by someone from the past. Tim makes a difficult decision.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Expectations
programme.desc: There are high expectations for the East Dillon team this year; Tami becomes frustrated with her new job.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: On the Outside Looking In
programme.desc: Coach learns that not everyone is pleased by the Lions season opening game. Vince realizes his newfound stardom comes with benefits, and Luke faces the consequences of his aggressive play.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: The Right Hand of the Father
programme.desc: Coach Taylor struggles to impose discipline on his players. A figure from Vince's past re-enters his life.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Keep Looking
programme.desc: Coach Taylor is forced to play mediator as tensions erupt in the locker room. The Lions welcome a new player, and Luke is recruited by Texas Methodist University.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Kingdom
programme.desc: Coach Taylor discusses recruitment regulations with Vince and his father, Ornette. When the Lions take a road trip, four of their stars make a pact that will stay with them forever.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Swerve
programme.desc: A popular magazine hails Coach as the 'Kingmaker.' Vince's past catches up with him when an old acquaintance demands that he repay his debt. Meanwhile, Luke reacts to the truth about Texas Methodist University.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Perfect Record
programme.desc: Rivalry week stirs up controversy when a website makes an embarrassing disclosure about one of the Lions' players: Vince.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Fracture
programme.desc: Coach Taylor fears he is beginning to lose his grip on the team when Vince alienates his teammates through his arrogance. Tami worries that one of her students is being neglected at home, and Becky enters a beauty pageant.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Gut Check
programme.desc: Coach Taylor threatens to suspend Vince in an effort to regain control of the team, which leaves Luke facing mounting pressure at the prospect of becoming top quarterback. Billy learns some unexpected news from Mindy, while Becky starts a new job.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Don't Go
programme.desc: An elite college football program attempts to lure Coach Taylor away from East Dillon, and Vince vows to earn his starting position back.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: The March
programme.desc: Coach Taylor feels threatened when East Dillon faces serious budget cuts. The Lions begin their quest for State.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Texas Whatever
programme.desc: Coach Taylor is offered a deal he cannot refuse, and Tim assesses his future plans when an old flame returns to Dillon.

programme.title: Friday Night Lights: Always
programme.desc: The Lions prepare for the state championship, while the Taylor's face life altering decisions.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: On his 11th birthday, Harry Potter receives a mysterious letter from the Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, telling him he has been chosen as one of the future students of the renowned school.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Harry is undaunted when he learns that great danger awaits him if he returns to Hogwarts. When he finally arrives at school, he finds a community in the grips of a mysterious and sinister terror that has literally 'petrified' some of its members.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: No-Shop Showdown
programme.desc: For the first time in GGG history, none of the competing chefs get to shop for their ingredients. Instead, Guy Fieri gives them each a cart full of groceries that has to last all three rounds, and he decides what they make in each round.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Family Food Feud: Part 2
programme.desc: It's a family affair in Flavortown when two restaurant-owning families compete for a chance at a $20,000 shopping spree. Each round, the families must choose one member to compete in a challenge that will earn a key advantage in the next round.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Clearance Wars
programme.desc: Everything in Flavortown must go, and Guy Fieri has the perfect solution: a clearance war! He gives four chefs a list of clearance items that they must use over the course of the competition.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All-Star Vegetarian Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son Hunter take a trip down GGG memory lane and re-watch the second Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Tournament from their ranch in California. They reminisce and play armchair quarterback as 16 DDD chefs compete to be crowned the champion.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat Bobby Flay: Finale Fight
programme.desc: The Beat Bobby Flay Tournament finale brings four winners back for a chance to defeat a Food Network legend and score $50,000. In round one, a pork product goes through a grinder, and a canned item in the second basket isn't what the chefs hoped for.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Double Trouble
programme.desc: It's up to the dynamic duo of Daphne Oz and Damaris Phillips to decide who has the skill to paint Bobby Flay out of the picture as chef and artist Enrique Limardo goes up against Southwestern chef Jeff Smedstad in an all-out culinary battle.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Feel the Judgment
programme.desc: The tables are turned when past Beat Bobby Flay judges Christian Petroni and Leah Cohen return to the kitchen to take matters into their own hands. Cooking Channel's Laura Vitale and Chef Jet Tila judge the judges.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Flame-tastic
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's good friends Michael Symon and Alex Guarnaschelli are back in the arena and looking to fire up a win. Armando Litiatco and Mikala Brennan battle for a chance to smoke Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Chef Adrianne Calvo is bringing her Miami heat as she goes head-to-head with German native and top Pennsylvania chef Ben Thomas.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Quick-Nic
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, take advantage of a gorgeous day by preparing for a picnic. Their stress-free and easy-to-make recipes include Orzo Salad, Watermelon Salsa, Apricot Rosemary Glazed Chicken, Zucchini Bread and a Citrus Cocktail.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: High School Reunion
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister Beth invite their high school BFF over to reminisce about old memories over a delicious meal. They share a few laughs together before enjoying a menu made of classics from their high school days.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Ranching Out with Ribs and Corn
programme.desc: Michael Symon turns the flavors of ranch dressing into a rub for Ranch-Rubbed Pork Ribs. He also uses it in Baked Sweet Potatoes with Charred Onion Ranch Dip. Michael's wife, Liz, makes Grilled Corn with Ranchovy Butter, featuring the rub yet again.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Get Out and Cook
programme.desc: It's time for fresh air and fresh flavors with Jeff Mauro's grilled spinach and artichoke stuffed chicken and Sunny Anderson's Migas Verde. Geoffrey Zakarian shares a recipe for grilled asparagus that uses only five ingredients.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Family Style: Can You Grill It?
programme.desc: The hosts pull out unexpected and flavourful foods to cook on the grill all summer long. Sunny starts with a grilled open-faced BLT and Geoffrey follows with grilled potatoes with chipotle yogurt. Then, Jeff makes a charred caprese salad.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Labor Day BBQ
programme.desc: The Kitchen caps off summer with the greatest recipes for a Labor Day BBQ. Geoffrey Zakarian starts with tips for making his pork roast sandwiches with spicy apricot mustard and Jeff Mauro highlights the last of a seasonal favourite.

programme.title: Chopped: Squab Goals
programme.desc: An ingredient basket containing squab kicks off an action-packed first round in the Chopped kitchen. As the chefs endeavor to make great entrees in round two, they must break down a large fish.

programme.title: Chopped: Kefir And Loathing
programme.desc: A basket ingredient with a 'secret' history and the fermented milk drink kefir are at the forefront of the appetizer round. The second basket looks to be deceptively simple, excpet for a strange blue drink.

programme.title: Chopped: Gefilte Dish
programme.desc: The chefs get some surprises in the ingredient baskets, starting with the appetizer round, when they have to make gefilte fish work with something super sweet and something soft and salty.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real-Deal Diners
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's traveling the country hitting up real-deal diners. From coast to coast and everywhere in-between, these all-American staples are servin' up the bomb breakfasts and classic comfort food, with a few surprises mixed into the menu.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Midnight Manhunt
programme.desc: A badly injured tortoise needs an innovative procedure and an eagle's death is investigated. Out on the lake, wardens educate the public on staying safe. As night falls, a car crash turns into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Liars and Trespassers
programme.desc: Game Warden McGee rushes to a domestic altercation. Game Wardens Zuniga and Roel run into trespassers, while Provasnik inspects a potentially stolen jet ski. Game Wardens Richards and McGee team up on an investigation, and a baby squirrel is rescued.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Reckless Behavior
programme.desc: During deer hunting season, Wardens Gould and Scott respond to a call about finding carcasses on private property. Then, stray bullets are shot into a horse owner's home, while hunters are questioned about hunting illegally.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confessions of a Poacher
programme.desc: Warden Richards confronts a suspected poacher for illegally hunting ducks and geese. Wardens Ben and Chelsea Bailey monitor an injured deer running along a busy highway, and a man is arrested after confessing to poaching a deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught By Surprise
programme.desc: Warden Price is on a mission to arrest out-of-state hunters with warrants for trespassing and hunting on private property. A young angler is haunted by his past and is taken to county jail, and Warden Richards questions a pair of dishonest fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deadly Conduct
programme.desc: Inman and Eddins assist on a manhunt when a suspect runs a constable off the road. An ordinary fishing check in Navarro County leads Amundson to illegal activity. In Jasper County, game wardens patrol an area after receiving trespassing complaints.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Rattled
programme.desc: In Jasper County, Game Warden Boone responds to a venomous rattlesnake. Game wardens investigate the illegal killing of a goose in the Texas Panhandle. In South Texas, Game Wardens follow up on a tip about a man going over the fishing limit.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught By Surprise
programme.desc: Warden Price is on a mission to arrest out-of-state hunters with warrants for trespassing and hunting on private property. A young angler is haunted by his past and is taken to county jail, and Warden Richards questions a pair of dishonest fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confessions of a Poacher
programme.desc: Warden Richards confronts a suspected poacher for illegally hunting ducks and geese. Wardens Ben and Chelsea Bailey monitor an injured deer running along a busy highway, and a man is arrested after confessing to poaching a deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Owl Gone Bad
programme.desc: It's the opening of deer and oyster season in Texas. On the Gulf, Game Wardens find illegal undersized oysters. In East Texas, Game Wardens patrol deer camps. An owl is rescued from a chicken coop and set free.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Pelicans and Poachers
programme.desc: On the Gulf, oyster boats and fish retailers are inspected. Outside San Antonio, a poacher is caught after posting pictures. In East Texas, Game Wardens patrol deer camps and help a pelican in distress.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Order on the Border
programme.desc: Wardens check hunting camps at the height of deer season. On the Rio Grande River, they stop a Mexican fisherman from poaching in U.S. waters. A Game Warden near Austin must rescue a trapped deer and get it to a rehabber.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for the illusive big horn sheep in the mountains of West Texas. A family near Houston reports shots from a neighboring ranch are raining down on their home. Wardens track down a bow hunter, incriminated by his own game camera.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Partner Patrols
programme.desc: Texas game wardens pair up to help animals in trouble, solve wildlife crimes and assist the public. Whether it's a baby gator that needs relocation or a man suffering from heatstroke, these wardens lend a hand.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Encounters
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens relocate a large herd of pronghorn to restore populations in West Texas, investigate the killing of a protected rattlesnake, and wrangle a loose bull. Game Wardens check hunting camps to ensure no one's taking too many white-tail deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Danger at Dawn
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Benny Richards is committed to conserving Texas wildlife. Game Warden Albert Flores enforces fishing laws. Game Warden Jennifer Provaznik schools anglers. Game Warden Jayme Deschaaf makes sure dove hunters follow the laws.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Small Town Troubles
programme.desc: Game wardens are ready for springtime in Texas. Wardens investigate a video of an illegal hunter. A concerned citizen reports a hunter on his property. A fisherman is illegally catching oysters. A game warden smells something fishy going on.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Old Warrants Die Hard
programme.desc: A game warden has a run-in with an acrobatic squirrel. A Mexican shrimp boat may have an illegal catch. Fishing without a license leads to a trip to jail. A mystery UTV caught-on-tape has a surprising driver. Some kids are found in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: The exhausted crew of the Brigitte Bardot scramble to evacuate the ailing vessel. And Captain Paul Watson goes on the offensive, sending a team to board the heavily armed security vessel: the Shonan Maru.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Never Say Die
programme.desc: The crew of the Steve Irwin are plunged into their most violent battle yet.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Counterstrike
programme.desc: When a massive target is detected, the Sea Shepherd sends out their new helicopter pilot to ID the mystery vessel.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Target Acquired
programme.desc: After months of frustration, Sea Shepherd finally finds their target, the Nisshin Maru.

programme.title: Whale Wars: The Devil's Den
programme.desc: Although its Sea Shepherd's 10th anti-whaling campaign in the Antarctic, it is their first without Captain Paul Watson. Peter Hammarstedt is taking over as campaign leader.

programme.title: Whale Wars: Fight to the Death
programme.desc: Rookie leader Peter Hamarstedt struggles as crew members fail to obey his orders with a brutal storm on the way. The campaign could be in jeopardy as Japanese harpoon ships are looming.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Witness Protection
programme.desc: A New York City banker puts his family into a witness protection program at his aunt's home when he is set up as the instigator of his company's fraudulent scheme.

programme.title: Movie: Blue Streak
programme.desc: A jewel thief is released from jail and sets out to find his hidden loot. However, when he returns to his hiding spot he finds the area has been turned into a police station and his only shot of recovering the diamonds is to impersonate a detective.

programme.title: Movie: Waist Deep
programme.desc: A former convict is placed in a bad situation when his son is kidnapped in a carjacking. Now with a ransom demand of $100,000 he must break the law to rescue his son with the aid of a street-smart hustler.

programme.title: Futurama: War Is the H-Word

programme.desc: While working Leela's old job, Fry opens a random tube and discovers that his girlfriend from 1999 was frozen shortly after him.

programme.title: Movie: Ghost Storm

programme.title: Movie: Zombie Tidal Wave

programme.title: Movie: Back to the Future III
programme.desc: A time traveller ventures to 1885 to prevent his friend's murder and preserve the future.

programme.title: Movie: Back to the Future II
programme.desc: After travelling to the year 2015 to fix his future family's problems, Marty finds himself having to return once again to 1955 to stop Biff from further altering time.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Master Office Issues
programme.desc: A couple purchased their current home in haste despite its flaws so they could be closer to work and school. Although they love the area, their 1990s house is dated and does not have all the space, function and style they would prefer.

programme.title: Love It or List It: All Work and No Play
programme.desc: After six years in their current home, Garrett and Katy disagree over whether it meets their requirements for style and function. Garrett loves its location in an area with rapidly increasing property values.

programme.title: Love It or List It: 1970s Drab to Fab
programme.desc: A couple planned to update their 1970s home when they moved in, but those ideas have taken a back seat to busy family life. Now Mom is ready to throw in the towel and find a newer, open concept home, but Dad's not ready to give up on their original one.

programme.title: Renovation Inc.: Balancing Act
programme.desc: Bryan must deliver a tough reality check, and Sarah struggles with the clients' design choices.

programme.title: Welcome to the Jungle: Finding Healing in Costa Rica
programme.desc: Atlanta newlyweds relocate to Costa Rica's Guanacaste peninsula because they believe the jungle is the best environment for their therapy work. They hope to find a tranquil home surrounded by lush forest and breathtaking ocean views.

programme.title: Mexico Life: Dreams of Pickleball in San Carlos
programme.desc: A couple is ready to trade cold Colorado winters for the beautiful and warm San Carlos. They're looking for a place that's large enough for entertaining, but her desire for a view might conflict with his dream of having his own private pickleball court.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Sunrise and Sunset on St. John
programme.desc: A Texas couple is looking to move to St. John to enjoy all that the island has to offer. He wants a pool with a sunset view, while she desires a sunrise-facing deck to enjoy her early morning coffee.

programme.desc: A professional extreme skier and his wife ditch the slopes of Colorado for beachfront living in Roatan, Honduras. They want a waterfront home with space for their dog so they can enjoy the laid-back atmosphere and activities.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Picture-Perfect Kitchen
programme.desc: After he grew up in a house on 100 acres and she spent her life in houses with small lots close to neighbors, a couple compromised on a fixer upper on 1.5 acres near a nice neighborhood.

programme.title: Love It or List It: First House Frustrations

programme.title: Love It or List It: Betting the Horse Farm

programme.desc: Captain Sandy Yawn is at the helm of the mega-yacht Wellington, cruising one of the most desired yachting locations in the Mediterranean: Mallorca, Spain. Malia returns as Captain Sandy's first female Bosun, a role she hopes to grow into.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Can't Touch This!
programme.desc: Hannah struggles to get her Second Stew in line, and tensions reach a boiling point when Lara refuses to take direction from Hannah. In the galley, Kiko finds himself up against guest that are less than satisfied. Malia deals with a green deck crew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: The Italian's Job
programme.desc: Romance is in bloom on the crew's first night out of the season as Pete makes his move while Rob and Jess find themselves connecting on a deeper level. The second charter kicks off when guest with ties to the music industry arrive.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Ace of Stew Face
programme.desc: With bad weather rolling in and down her second stew, Hannah scrambles to manage the interior with only Jess to rely on. Captain Sandy and Malia draw a hard line with the deck team when they call the guys out for their questionable behaviour.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Bringing the Thunder
programme.desc: A blast from the past returns amidst a massive thunderstorm that threatens to keep the Wellington docked for their next charter. Rob and Jessica deepen their connection, while Pete's attitude continues to frustrate Malia.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Oh Snap!
programme.desc: Kiko faces his biggest challenge yet when demanding charter guests invite friends to join a six-course dinner. Hannah confronts Bugsy about their past, while Rob and Jess find their budding relationship threatened by a new revelation.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: No Mushroom for Error
programme.desc: An injured Jess fights to maintain her spot on the boat, while another crew member’s inappropriate behavior finally catches up to him. Meanwhile, high-maintenance charter guests challenge the interior and expose cracks in Hannah and Bugsy’s relationship.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: $=MC2
programme.desc: A limited edition photograph of Albert Einstein comes in the shop. Rick and Corey are presented with a collection of confidential documents from the Pentagon.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Flight of the Chum
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars have a chance to buy one of the quietest air crafts ever made--a vintage Schweizer glider.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Yankee Panky
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars get ready to rock when a man brings in an extremely rare original poster from one of Jimi Hendrix's final performances.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Learning the Ropes
programme.desc: A first edition of Henry David Thoreau's 'Walden' comes into the shop. Corey sets his sights on a 19th century rope gun.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Bachelor
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars throw Rick Harrison a bachelor party. Then, a rare copy of 'The Adventures of Tom Sawyer' comes into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Rick and Corey check out a Rolls-Royce once owned by Johnny Cash. Then, a coin from the Byzantine Empire lands in the shop. Also, Chumlee fills in at a friend's hot dog stand.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Shufflin' and Hustlin'
programme.desc: An early, illustrated version of Rip Van Winkle is brought into the shop. Then, Corey and Chum encounter a candle in the shape of President Richard Nixon's head. And later, the guys take the Old Man out to play shuffleboard.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Tough Cookie
programme.desc: Rick tries to get in on a deal involving a gold and silver Remington Arms gun. Then, a collection of Mr.T dolls arrives at the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: RC/ DC
programme.desc: Rock on with the Pawn Stars when a signed AC/DC album electrifies the shop. Then, Rick gets fired up over a Beals Model Remington revolver. Later, when Rich wants to find new ways to advertise the pawn shop, he thinks small to get big results.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Presidential Pawn
programme.desc: Brush up on some history with the Pawn Stars when a signed handwritten letter from Founding Father, James Monroe, arrives at the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pops Pawn
programme.desc: An astrological armillary sphere; a British Smarties candy dispenser; a signed Louis Armstrong photo and handkerchief; a vintage Ghirardelli billboard.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick Gets Axed
programme.desc: Corey and Chum hope to be the heroes when a piece of artwork from the original 1995 Batman- Spiderman crossover comic arrives at the shop. Then, Rick gets a look at a Revolutionary War halberd.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick the Emperor
programme.desc: A 44 BC Roman coin, a rare 1960s leather jacket, plaster casts of Joe DiMaggio's feet, a scarlet fever sign.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Another Day
programme.desc: Madonna's 1988 day planner; a 1910 phrenology head; an 1800s locket with preacher Henry Ward Beecher; a 1980s egg chair used for hearing tests.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mini Miles
programme.desc: Rick and Marie Osmond come across what could potentially be one of the first ever Barbie dolls. Chumlee takes a ride in a tiny amusement park car, while Corey tries to make a deal. A rare 'Citizen Kane' production still may be worth a buy.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawnie and Clyde
programme.desc: A set of illustrations from Disney's 'Sleeping Beauty' prompt Chum to make a sketchy deal that draws lots of attention. Flashy door handles from one of Las Vegas' first casinos has Rick feeling like he won the jackpot.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Stamp Stumped
programme.desc: Rick debates whether a few gold and silver coins are worth cashing in for. Corey struggles to determine the value of some peculiar tax stamps. Chumlee is thrilled when a signed Bob Marley album enters the shop. Rick ponders concertina lessons.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: E Equals MC Pawn
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars make calculated moves when some handwritten math by Albert Einstein could multiply their profits. Chumlee tries to prove he isn't dim when he pays big bucks to have an antique headlamp tester shining brightly once again.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: President's Day Sale
programme.desc: Rick is after an autographed card of President Abraham Lincoln. Corey and Chum consider paying a hefty sum for a President Bill Clinton designed golf driver shaft, until discovering that he may not have used it himself.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Highly Explosive Pawn
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck when a British Navy gunpowder bucket blasts into the shop and a seller approaches the Pawn Stars to present them with a past prop from 'Back to the Future, Part II.'

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Tangled Web
programme.desc: After a young woman vanishes from her neighborhood, North Carolina detectives are snared in a tangled web of deceit as they uncover a vicious love triangle. It's a race against time to find a killer and the evidence they need to solve a dark mystery.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Killer by the Coast
programme.desc: When two female college students go missing, their whereabouts remain unknown for months, until a parole officer recalls startling information that would lead investigators to the backyard of a remote property.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Fatal Mistake
programme.desc: A bizarre trail from South Dakota to Minnesota ends in a dark discovery and a case gone cold. While investigators question whether a man of God is the key to solving this mystery, they fear blind faith is not only risky, but could prove to be deadly.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: A deadly mystery with deep running roots snakes through a small Alabama town, shattering a young family and baffling the community. Investigators unlock long held Southern secrets to solve a murder and discover a truth steeped in blood and revenge.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Death in the Desert
programme.desc: After a homeowner randomly uncovers human remains while doing yard work in his California backyard, a homicide detective enlists the help of a local veterinarian to solve the murder.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Gone Girls
programme.desc: When a man and his dog make a disturbing discovery in a backyard beach, a series of horrifying events unfold in a sleepy South Carolina town. Investigators fear no one is safe as they desperately track a killer potentially hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: When a beautiful garden turns into a dark abyss, the serenity in Salem, Oregon is shattered. All is not as it seems as investigators dig into the life of a single mom. As the grisly details begin to unfold, the chase is on to catch a killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Last Call
programme.desc: An unsuspecting field worker makes a horrifying discovery in a backyard orchard and detectives chase down deadly clues. But when a savage killer slips through the cracks, innocent lives are threatened and solving this case is suddenly in jeopardy.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Hog Trail Murders
programme.desc: After a husband and wife realize their dogs have been dragging human bones into their backyard, cops learn that a serial killer is using the nearby woods to indulge in his dark fantasies.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: New England Nightmare
programme.desc: A murderous ripple spreads through a lovely New England town when a ghastly discovery is made in a backyard barn. The search for answers uncovers troubling questions about a doting mom and everyone is a suspect until the truth is finally uncovered.

programme.title: Family Guy: Throw It Away
programme.desc: After Lois reads a new book on the joys of decluttering, she challenges the rest of the Griffins to throw anything out of the house that does not spark joy. While all starts out well, Lois soon takes the decluttering to a surprising extreme.

programme.title: Family Guy: Pal Stewie
programme.desc: To Stewie's surprise, he quickly befriends a boy his age, but is devastated when he realizes he isn't invited to his birthday party. Meanwhile, Peter and Lois attend a self-empowerment seminar.

programme.title: Family Guy: Nanny Goats
programme.desc: The Griffins get a nanny for the kids, courtesy of Lois' parents, which gives Peter and Lois the opportunity to reconnect.

programme.title: Family Guy: Family Guy Lite
programme.desc: After a mishap at work, Peter decides to take his health more seriously and diet with the help of Quagmire, Joe, and Cleveland. Meanwhile, takes a stab at writing a romantic fantasy novel.

programme.title: Family Guy: HTTPete
programme.desc: To help promote the brewery to millennials, Peter adopts the millennial lifestyle, and his methods soon attract the attention of a high-powered Silicon Valley executive.

programme.title: Family Guy: Adam West High
programme.desc: When Brian's proposition to rename Quahog's high school 'Adam West High,' to honour the late Mayor West, is successful, he feels encouraged to run for office as Quahog's new mayor. The race takes a turn when Quagmire campaigns against Brian.

programme.title: Family Guy: Pawtucket Pete
programme.desc: The Pawtucket Brewery hires new bosses, who decide to change the company's mascot. In an attempt to be crowned the new face of Pawtucket Ale, Peter and Brian go head-to-head.

programme.title: Family Guy: Boy (Dog) Meets Girl (Dog)
programme.desc: At the vet's office, Brian meets a female show dog named Ellie. Smitten with her, he enters a show dog competition, in which the winner gets to breed with her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ned-Liest Catch
programme.desc: Feeling guilty for getting Mrs. Krabappel suspended after one of his school pranks, Bart helps her escape detention, and Ned Flanders winds up saving her life in the process.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Falcon and the D'Ohman
programme.desc: Homer befriends a reserved security guard recently hired by the nuclear power plant. Plagued by violent flashbacks from his past as a CIA agent, he must overcome his tortured nightmares to save Homer from a Ukrainian terrorist.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Nightmare on Ocean Avenue Street
programme.desc: The kids set out for their regular Halloween shenanigans, but when everyone's candy bags start mysteriously disappearing, it's up to Tina, Louise and Gene to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Teddy decorates the restaurant to compete with another handyman.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: If You Love It So Much, Why Don't You Marionette?
programme.desc: The kids visit a marionette theater for a school field trip and Louise gets on the theater owner's bad side. Meanwhile, Bob takes pity on a flyer guy who's handing out flyers in front of the restaurant.

programme.title: Movie: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: Homer's actions cause a leak of radioactive material from the Nuclear Plant into the river. Homer has to try and fix the problem before Springfield can no longer be saved.

programme.title: Archer: Crossing Over
programme.desc: Once again, Archer's sex life compromises his effectiveness as an agent. But this time it's more serious.

programme.title: Archer: Skin Game
programme.desc: Archer is faced with a dilemma when his murdered fiancée, Katya, miraculously reappears.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Das Bus

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lard of the Dance

programme.desc: Homer moves the family to an old farm where he and Bart grow an addictive crop of Tomacco.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Moe
programme.desc: Moe returns to bartending school to hone his skills and leaves Homer in charge of the bar.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Ganglands
programme.desc: There are two types of animals in the animal kingdom: the hunter and the hunted. Alone, it’s tough to survive in this world. In a team, the odds improve. For each gang, a territory. For each territory, a war.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Giant Killers
programme.desc: Long after the age of dinosaurs, giants still roam this planet. Engineered to withstand the test of time, these animals have super-sized bodies, thick skin, sharp teeth and bad attitudes.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Cat Attack
programme.desc: In Africa, big cats clawed their way to the top of the food chain. Every hunt is a deadly execution of power, stealth and speed. In the quiet of the night, no prey will hear them coming. Beware of getting stalked by Africa’s deadliest cats.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Invaders
programme.desc: This is an action-packed showcase of Africa’s top 10 deadliest invaders.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Arms Race
programme.desc: See what it takes to survive in the African wilderness.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Super Powers
programme.desc: In order to survive, animals across the Kalahari have developed a range of superpowers.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Moving Targets
programme.desc: In Southern Africa, an animal's instinct to move is the key to their survival.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Bloodlines
programme.desc: Africa’s rookie predators still have many lessons to learn.

programme.title: Africa's Most Extreme
programme.desc: There is a 1200-mile strip of land on southwestern coast of Africa where the searing Namib Desert meets the frigid Atlantic Ocean. Here, the basic elements of the earth exist in paradoxical extremes.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild India: Tiger Jungles
programme.desc: Tucked away from the densely populated cities of India lies an ancient jungle where wildlife must battle to survive. This is the real story of the jungles of central India made famous by Rudyard Kipling’s 'Jungle Book.'

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss
programme.desc: When footage of a strange deep-sea vessel is uncovered, experts wonder if its evidence of an autonomous alien craft sent to explore earth, and using cutting-edge tech, investigators follow the clues to an unexpected explanation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.
