programme.title: Homicide City: The Professor's Wife
programme.desc: When Ellen Robb's husband finds her murdered in their quiet suburban Philadelphia home, evidence initially points to a robbery gone wrong. But as police dig deeper into the couple's life, they learn the motive may be far more sinister.

programme.title: Homicide City: Society Hill Slaying
programme.desc: When Philadelphia jewelers Patty and Richard Zimmerman are found executed in their Society Hill townhome, police suspect a robbery gone wrong. But, when they discover nothing has been taken, they realize the motive may be far more sinister.

programme.title: Homicide City: Main Line Massacre
programme.desc: When Philadelphia Mainliners Courtlandt and Alexandra Gross are found murdered in their home, detectives begin the hunt for a calculated killer which takes them from one of the wealthiest zip codes in the country straight into the heart of Philly.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: You Have to Get Out
programme.desc: Edward Pehowic harbored dark secrets before he married Robin Healey, and she would catch only glimpses of her husband's dark side. But it wasn't until after she finally escaped from him once and for all that she realized just how evil he was.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Don't Believe in Forgiveness
programme.desc: Teri Knight spent weeks driving cross-country, desperately searching for the secret her ex-husband, Manuel Gehring, took to his grave. It took years before a stranger finally solved the mystery that haunted Teri ever since learning Manuel died in prison.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I'm Not the Monster I Was
programme.desc: An unapologetic 14-year-old boy confesses to the murder of his best friend. Twelve years later, he's back in court with chance at a reduced sentence.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Face of My Torturer
programme.desc: William Knorr's mother, Theresa, always threatened that if she ever went to jail for what she had done, she would take him down with her. After years spent helping her keep the horrors secret, could he ever escape or would he wind up like all the others?

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Don't Believe in Forgiveness
programme.desc: Teri Knight spent weeks driving cross-country, desperately searching for the secret her ex-husband, Manuel Gehring, took to his grave. It took years before a stranger finally solved the mystery that haunted Teri ever since learning Manuel died in prison.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I'm Not the Monster I Was
programme.desc: An unapologetic 14-year-old boy confesses to the murder of his best friend. Twelve years later, he's back in court with chance at a reduced sentence.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Hate Being Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: When Robin Doll was rescued from her mother's violence and went to live with her father, she thought she had cheated death. She had no way of knowing that the man she looked to as her savior was hiding something even worse.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Tried to Prevent This
programme.desc: For 17 years, Kathy Swanson feared her son, Michael, would one day harm someone. For 17 years, she tried in vain to convince people that something about Michael was different until that dreadful day finally came that her worst nightmare came true.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Soap Star's Secret
programme.desc: Thom Bierdz had finally made it big. When he brought his troubled younger brother out to Los Angeles, he thought he could help set him straight. He never expected that the price he would pay for being wrong would be the life of someone he loved.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: In Love With The Devil
programme.desc: Bernadette was 17 when her boyfriend, Brian Sugrim, told her he had murdered someone. But she didn't believe him. Only years later would she realize the true evil that Brian was capable of. Will a monster get away with murder?

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Demon in His Eyes
programme.desc: As children, Betty and Ulayla adored their little brother, Johnny, and tried to protect him. As they got older, Johnny did strange things, but they never believed he was capable of pure evil until he confessed a horrible secret.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Was His First Victim
programme.desc: Felecia Collier almost killed Chester Turner once. At the time, she was relieved to hear that he would survive. But years later, that moment would become the biggest regret of her life. If only she had just killed him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Raised a Sociopath
programme.desc: On the day Robert Foust contemplated killing his own son, Aaron, he saw it as the only way to prevent Aaron from becoming a murderer. But instead, Robert chose to put himself and his son in God's hands. And God's plan would make him question everything.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Twisted Sister
programme.desc: When Elizabeth Flores was a child, her sister, Louise, tried to shield her from a horrible family secret. But when Louise met David Turpin, that all changed. The girl who ran from monsters became one herself.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: While I Was Gone
programme.desc: Michele Ward was always glad that her husband, Richard Daniel Starrett, didn't mind her frequent trips to visit her parents. She never guessed that he sent her away because his sick perversion was getting harder and harder to hide.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Nights I Don't Remember
programme.desc: On the mornings when Joylynn Martinez couldn't remember the night before, she always told herself that she must have had too much to drink. She never suspected that her own husband, Robert Howard Bruce, was responsible or that he was just getting started.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Who Killed Jane Doe 59?
programme.desc: Police search for the name of an unidentified woman murdered in 1969 and the person who killed her. The one lead that keeps coming up is Charles Manson and the Manson Family.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Law and Murder
programme.desc: A double murder involving the family of a federal judge will lead the FBI, US Marshals and Chicago PD on an investigation of epic proportions. But when law enforcement finds the end of the trail, they learn the death count may climb higher.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Burned Alive
programme.desc: On a back road in Mississippi, a popular 19-year-old girl is set on fire and left to burn alive. Her last words lead detectives down a road of dead ends and the case goes cold until a special agent taps into her location data and finds a suspect.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Cheerleader and the Hitman
programme.desc: When a widower and father of three is found dead outside his Long Island home, police have reason to believe shady business dealings may have caused his murder. But then a tip leads to three unlikely suspects, exposing dark family secrets.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in the Shower
programme.desc: Richard Garber thinks he has gotten away with murder, after he bludgeons a neighbour to death. But when he becomes the lead suspect in the case, Garber hits the road spending eight months dodging the Feds and sneaking cash from his girlfriend.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Lock and Load
programme.desc: A Texas separatist group takes two hostages. Rangers are able to negotiate the release, however two members, Richard Keyes and Mike Matson get away, evading helicopters and dogs. Using an underground militia group, Keyes hides out in the woods undetected.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store
programme.desc: In 1975, Michael Brown killed Richard Sullivan during a robbery. Brown was convicted, and while in prison married a woman named Donna. He soon escaped so they could start a new life together. They lived for more than 15 years without incident.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as a War Vet
programme.desc: Posing as a veteran and preying on women to get cash, cars, and even a house, Jerrod Durr finds himself in a multistate game of cat and mouse with cops.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make You a Superstar
programme.desc: A scam artist conned aspiring artists out of millions. A modern day Bonnie and Clyde eluded police until a slip-up led to their doorstep.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Boyfriend to Support
programme.desc: In jail for fraud, Steven Russell falls in love with inmate Philip Morris. When Morris is released, Russell is desperate to be reunited. He escapes from jail with elaborate cons. Once out, the two live a lavish life, supported by scams that alert the FBI.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Dead Man's ID
programme.desc: Michael Hess is a wanted prison escapee on the run with a new identity and has been living in the same town he is wanted in for two decades. Hess learns to beat the system and enjoy his new life of work, weed and women before he's busted.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Raps
programme.desc: Raymond Ross skips town after beating a teen into a coma. With his cousin, who is also wanted, Ross enters the drug scene selling dope and his own music. After a close call, Ross decides to let loose and party hard while police close in on this trail.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught Via Email
programme.desc: When Edward Roberson and two fellow inmates went to the showers, they didn't come back. Breaking out, the three scaled the fences and made a run for it. Roberson has escaped and now has stolen guns, in a stolen car running for his life.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be the 'Green Baron'
programme.desc: Tony Darwin makes millions piloting marijuana into Florida. Even after getting caught, he continues works for a notorious smuggler until a deadly plane crash forces him to flee the country.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Death Certificate
programme.desc: After witnessing a murder, Anthony Ragno goes on the run. Building a new life trafficking pot in the Haitian islands, a coke addiction and close calls with local governments drive Ragno back to the US with a fake name.

programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house that’s flooding after two monster custom homes are built on either side. The homeowners want to blame the builders, but Mike reveals that the real solution lies closer to home.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Lawn and Order
programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Teach and Train
programme.desc: One half of the team restores a huge log cabin at the Boneyard, the other half teaches some young men how to build a cabin in Tennessee. Meanwhile, Mark scouts a cabin built with pine logs, and the guys visit a shop filled with old-time treasures.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Tim and Alex Special
programme.desc: Tim and Alex share their journey from mortal enemies to good friends.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Alabama Lake House
programme.desc: The builders fight through mud and heat to turn the salvaged Shaver house from West Virginia into a two-storey lake house in Alabama. Mark experiments with new construction products, and everyone ends up in the lake.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Mark Bowe checks out some renovated grain silos and the craziest treehouse in town while the guys put a roof on their Texas timber frame. Mark's log cabin gets a Texas-style makeover, and he gets some help from his new neighbors, the Junk Gypsies.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sea It to Believe It!
programme.desc: Everyone loves to go to the beach, but this time Lucas is bringing the beach to your backyard!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Water You Waiting For?
programme.desc: It has been a long time coming for these families to finally build their dream pools.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lake It or Not?
programme.desc: Lucas Congdon and his team at Lucas Lagoons build custom pools and gardens.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Cape Charles Charmer in Virginia
programme.desc: A woman and her daughters relocate from Virginia Beach, VA, to the quaint beach town of Cape Charles. They find a charming fixer upper that will be perfect for their family but it's in need of some serious repairs.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Coastal Cottage in Hampton, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple that dreams of raising their two sons along the shores of Hampton, Virginia, finds a waterfront property in need of serious updating.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Enchanted in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: Leslie and Kris love the crystal waters of Emerald Isle, North Carolina, and want to buy a beach property there that's big enough for their family of four. They find their perfect space, but it needs sprucing up before they can call it home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Florida Engagement Renovation
programme.desc: Newly engaged couple Missy and Devon are looking to purchase their first home together in Ormond-by-the-Sea, Florida. With their wedding months away, the project threatens to be too much for the young couple to handle.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Backyard Beachside Blowout in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: After years of visiting Emerald Isle, North Carolina, with their three kids, Matt and Megann are ready to buy a weekend getaway home at the beach. After finding a fixer-upper in their budget, they have $50,000 to create a luxurious outdoor space.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Mystic, Connecticut
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to Mystic, Conn., to conquer land and sea with a totally bonkers, Portuguese-inspired burger and a crazy coastal feast of chowder.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pretzel-a, Queen of Dessert
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Crystal River, Florida, for the Florida Manatee Festival, where he tries the OMG Pretzel Bomb and the Fried King Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gordita, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the jackpot with midway eats, like the onion ring nacho supreme and cosmic funnel cake, at the Pasco County Fair in Florida. Later, he decks the halls and grabs a bite or two at the sights and sounds of Christmas in San Marcos, Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Rowdy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Arkansas State Fair in Little Rock to discover a few brand-new favourites. In addition to the eponymous Arkanstick and rolled ice-cream treat known as the Rainbow Roll there are also deep-fried Pina Coladas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There's Something About Cherry
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in Macon, Georgia, for the International Cherry Blossom Festival and some of the prettiest, pinkest carnival treats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seoul Dip Sisters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets festive at the California Mid-Winter Fair and Fiesta! He's sampling the Seoul Dip- a Korean twist on the French Dip- then keeps things spicy with the Diablo Dog before going for a sweet finish with the Supreme Samoa doughnut stack.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Devil Wears Pasta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets things started in Florida at the Okeechobee County Fair where he samples the Hot Wing Grilled Cheese, the Sweet Bacon Devil Burger and the made-in-Florida Strawberry Margarita Funnel Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Orange is the New Snack
programme.desc: Noah Cappe discovers brand new carnival eats in the orange groves of California at the Cloverdale Citrus Fair. The Bacon Churro Cheeseburger is a meaty mouthful sandwiched between two churros.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bite Club
programme.desc: Noah Cappe celebrates the arrival of spring in Winchester, Va., at the Shenandoah Apple Blossom Festival. He starts the day with the Cowboy Breakfast and ends it with Caramel Apple Tots.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Best Meal Deal
programme.desc: You don't have to sacrifice incredible food experiences in order to save a buck. Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif., Duff Goldman saves a ton as he takes on the enormous Orca Platter.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feast of the Middle East
programme.desc: Middle Eastern cuisine comes from more than ten countries, making it some of the most diverse and popular food on the planet.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Key Ingredient
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the surprise ingredient that goes into the best cinnamon roll ever, Alex Guarnaschelli loves sourdough bread made with pickle juice, and Monti Carlo heads to New Orleans for the most unique, irresistible oysters ever.

programme.title: Patti Labelle's Place: 50 Cent and Naturi Naughton
programme.desc: Patti LaBelle invites Grammy winner Curtis '50 Cent' Jackson over for some fresh and delicious comfort food. Dancing up a storm in the kitchen, they prepare a menu of Slow-Cooked Brisket, Smashed Potatoes and Patti's Southern-Style Fried Corn.

programme.title: Patti Labelle's Place: Estelle and Joe Zee
programme.desc: Patti LaBelle invites her friend, fashion guru Joe Zee, over for a simple Shrimp Scampi served over Angel Hair Pasta. She tops off the meal with Apple-Peach Compote and Vanilla Ice Cream.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Say Cheese
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay knows that cheese makes everything better, and brunch is no exception. He serves up some cheese-filled dishes like Meyer lemon ricotta crepes with candied almonds, a frittata with thyme roasted potatoes, smoked mozzarella and tomato-basil.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Retro Revamp Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby gives tried-and-true brunch staples a modern makeover with simple techniques and everyday ingredients.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Weekend Staycation
programme.desc: A weekend staycation brunch at Chef Bobby Flay's home! Bobby's kitchen is the destination for a cozy menu of crunchy maple topped oatmeal, avocado salmon benedict, cinnamon sugar mini pancake muffins.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocoholic Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is covering the kitchen in chocolate for a luscious menu of sweet and savory treats like dark chocolate waffles with white chocolate custard sauce and espresso-chocolate whipped cream.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Mountains Of Meat
programme.desc: Michael Symon meets a chef bringing the Indian street food flavors of his childhood to Asheville, N.C., with his own take on a sloppy joe that he calls a Sloppy Jai, with lamb hash and 30 Indian spices.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brunchtime Bbq
programme.desc: In Charleston, S.C., Michael Symon smokes a whole hog and makes chorizo from scratch for a saucy BBQ brunch burrito with two different fire-roasted salsas. In Atlanta, an authentic Caribbean roasted pork sandwich has a dedicated local following.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Smorgasbord For A Shark's Appetite
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon finds a food truck serving up two can't-miss creations: cheeseburger tacos with a house-made beer cheese sauce and a Jamaican jerk fried fish taco with mango salsa.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Mystic, Connecticut
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to Mystic, Conn., to conquer land and sea with a totally bonkers, Portuguese-inspired burger and a crazy coastal feast of chowder.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland (Maine)
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits the land of lighthouses and lobsters: Portland, ME. His main event awaits him at the Tradewinds Café where he'll take on the Manimal Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Fargo, ND
programme.desc: Casey’s eating adventure takes him to Fargo, North Dakota for a hearty European take on a cheesy classic, a breakfast-dessert mash up, and the Boiler Room’s Hot Dish Challenge – a massive Midwestern meal made for the entire family…or just one man.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Scottsdale, AZ
programme.desc: Casey’s culinary quest brings him to Scottsdale, Arizona where he’ll fry up a Latin staple, take on a stone age feast, and take on a four-pound deli platter in the Chompie’s Day at the Deli Challenge.

programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Suitcase Switcheroo / More Cowbell for Bob
programme.desc: When Bob mixes up his suitcase with another traveler, the pugs head to Spain on a mission to retrieve it. Then, Bob can't find his signature instrument for the reunion of his high school rock band.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The French Toast Connection/ Take Me Out to the Pug Game
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly travel to France to get Bob some French toast. Then, the pugs chase Bob's prized baseball across the city.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Temple of the Tiger/ The Gift-Mazing Birthday
programme.desc: Freddy and Pip try their hardest to keep a baby tiger prince clean; Freddy tries to find the perfect birthday present for one of the new babies.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Caught Blue-Handed/ To Squeak, or not to Squeak
programme.desc: When a mysterious rash of blue spots breaks out among some of the toys in the clinic, Doc traces the 'mystery pox' back to Donny's toy monster, Glo-Bo, who had been finger-painting earlier in the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Big Day/ Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Double Doggie Dare!/ Empire State of Mind
programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.title: Bluey: Shops / The Pool / Blue Mountains
programme.desc: Bluey and her friends want to play a game of 'Shops'; Bluey and her family take a trip to the pool; The family plays with hand puppets.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Froginizer/ My Fair Animal
programme.desc: The Muppet Babies play superheroes. Piggy and Summer help Kermit discover his superpower.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Back to School
programme.desc: After going back to their elementary school to complete a hero assessment exam, Phoebe and Max realize passing a fifth grade test won't be easy when the instructor is a former classmate that Max tormented when they were younger.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Original Prankster
programme.desc: Despite promising his girlfriend he would stop pranking, Max pulls an epic gag that his friend gets blamed for. As the school's principal moves to expel the boy, Max must fix the situation while still keeping his role a secret.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Can't Spy Me Love
programme.desc: After seeing a cute guy but missing her chance to meet him, Phoebe accesses the Hero League's villain search software to track him down. However, Phoebe's abuse of power leads to unexpected consequences for her crush.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Chutes and Splatters
programme.desc: Phoebe's newest superhero mission is to babysit President Kuckbutt's troublemaking teen daughter, but the assignment quickly snowballs out of control when Phoebe's charge sneaks into the town's illegal nightclub.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Who's Your Daddy/ Homewrecker
programme.desc: Dad can't attend a Squirrelly Scout Festival; Vicky frames Timmy for destroying his house.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: School's Out! - The Fairly Odd Parents Musical
programme.desc: It's the first day of summer, and Timmy and his friends are counting down to the end of school. Everyone is excited until parents send their children to Flappy Bob's Learnatorium, an all-summer-long educational camp for kids.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's House Party
programme.desc: While grocery shopping, SpongeBob discovers a 'How to Throw a Party' kit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandma's Kisses/ Squidville
programme.desc: Bob's Grandma gives him a kiss in public; Squid decides to leave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: All That Glitters/ Wishing You Well
programme.desc: SpongeBob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip; Mr. Krabs installs a wishing well near the Krusty Krab and sends SpongeBob down the well in a bucket to collect the coins.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bummer Vacation/ Wigstruck
programme.desc: SpongeBob has never taken a vacation, so Krabs makes his #1 employee take the day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Procrastination/ I'm With Stupid
programme.desc: Bob is easily distracted from an essay; Bob and Pat attempt to prove who's smarter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dunces and Dragons/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: A freak jousting accident lands Bob and Pat in a medieval Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Club SpongeBob/ My Pretty Seahorse
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build a small clubhouse and tell Squid he can't join. Spongebob finds a stray sea horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wet Painters/ Krusty Krab Training Video
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Patrick paint the inside of his house; training for employees.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Driven to Tears/ Rule of Dumb
programme.desc: Sponge Bob fails his driver's test again, Pat asks them to prove the test can be passed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spy Buddies/ Boat Smarts/ Good 'Ol What's-His-Name
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Flea in Her Dome/ Donut of Shame
programme.desc: Sandy must get rid of her Tree Dome of fleas; Patrick feels bad about taking a donut.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krabby Patty That Ate Bikini Bottom / Bubble Buddy Returns
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs uses Sandy's experimental growth formula on a Krabby Patty and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pest of the West
programme.desc: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Smoothe Jazz at Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward lose their passes and try desperately to sneak backstage at the sold-out Kelpy G show.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Lost Mattress/ Krabs vs. Plankton
programme.desc: Bob buys Mr. Krabs a new mattress; Plankton sues Mr. Krabs for failing to post a warning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Hat for Pat/ Toy Store of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs offers Patrick a job as a sign-holder. SpongeBob and Patrick spend the night locked in a toy store.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snowball Effect/ One Krab's Trash
programme.desc: Pat and SpongeBob play in the snow; Mr. Krabs sells trash as antiques.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Abrasive Side / Earworm
programme.desc: SpongeBob can never say 'no'; SpongeBob has a song stuck in his head.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Clash of Triton
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants his friends and family to help celebrate King Neptune's birthday.

programme.desc: International superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music, laughter and stories.

programme.title: Young Dylan
programme.desc: A family's world is turned upside down when their nephew, an aspiring hip-hop star, moves in with them unannounced.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy and his fairy godparents have magical adventures.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: Moon Circus/ Every Day Is Earth Day

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why: The Town Picnic: The Amazing Expandable Clubhouse
programme.desc: Elinor and her friends follow a bee to its hive and observe the honey-making process, where they discover that honey is goopier when it has less water in it. Elinor, Olive and Ari welcome new members to The Explorer's Club.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Four Furry Superheroes

programme.desc: The mercurial Sherlock Holmes is back on British soil. Doctor Watson and his wife, Mary, prepare to become parents.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Cedarquist/ Oeth

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: The Tiger Attack (Part 1)

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: Dangerous Illusion (Part 2)
programme.desc: Roy tries to recover from severe wounds inflicted by his beloved tiger Mantacore, but the team’s excuses for the animal’s behavior lose credibility upon further investigation.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Murder in Vegas
programme.desc: A burnt antique trunk was found in the Nevada desert in 1995, filled with charred bones and a skull with five bullet holes. Investigators convicted the killer with help from a method used in the era of Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: Alaska Experiment: Back From the Wild

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Rogue Rage
programme.desc: The newly-formed group desperately hunts for moose. When Oliver refuses to go along with the plan and is an obstacle in the line of fire, Andrew pushes back. Army veteran Adam arrives at base camp and immediately tackles critical building projects.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Under House Arrest
programme.desc: Andrew and Gerrid return victorious from the moose hunt, uniting the band for the first time. But a sudden cold spell leads to a scramble to make winter shelters. Oliver's refusal to follow the group's plan leads to an explosive confrontation.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Chase Boat Rescue
programme.desc: Listing heavily and taking on water, Junior calls on chase boat rescue for the first time in series history. Wild Bill sends Nick 20 feet off the deck in spite of his fear of heights. Josh and Casey hit a massive wave that knocks out greenhorn Maria.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dutch Harbor Double Cross
programme.desc: On the Summer Bay there's hell to pay when Bill's backup block goes missing. Cornelia Marie skippers Josh and Casey navigate a tenuous partnership at the Russian line. Weighed down by three full tanks, Sig puts a heavy Northwestern in Mandy's hands.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bomb Cyclone
programme.desc: The Wizard catches fire in a violent storm known as a bomb cyclone. Josh and Casey attempt to fish in 30-foot seas, while two rogue waves slam the Southern Wind. Wild Bill grinds his crew 72 straight hours bringing himself to the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Crash
programme.desc: Battling exhaustion, Wild Bill and his crew face the full wrath of the bomb cyclone. A snapped tendon puts the Summer Bay down a man. Josh gambles on crab-rich grounds in a costly venture north. An injured Mac fights to get Junior through the storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: As an injury knocks Sig out of his wheelhouse, Mandy takes the helm to face a disgruntled Northwestern crew. On the Wizard, damaged hydraulics and an umbilical hernia deal Keith a double gut punch. Josh and Casey suffer tragedy on the Cornelia Marie.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: Stuffed pots come at a price as Jake scrambles to repair a slack tank before it kills his crab or capsizes the Saga. Josh and Casey's rudder fails in heavy traffic and Wild Bill's new greenhorn makes an easy target for an out-of-control picking hook.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Danger Close
programme.desc: Josh and Casey race to haul pots as engine failure threatens their delivery window. As seawater destroys his hydraulic motors, Junior attempts a risky high seas delivery of three new motors. Harley and his crew bang heads over his fishing strategy.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: What Now?: Relationship Roadblocks

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Keeping an Open Mind
programme.desc: Tamara wants an out-of-the box gown that makes a statement for her destination wedding.

programme.title: Storage Wars: ¡Auctions Arriba!
programme.desc: Dave does not intend to let another great locker get by and Rene attempts some inside information.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The One With Mary and Allee
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi refuse to be fooled by the allure of showbiz treasures, but Mary and her new friend, Allee, are targeted in Tinseltown.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Sundown Showdown
programme.desc: A night time auction in Huntington Beach, California, has the bidders looking for a late night score. Ivy and Mary start the evening with some not-so-friendly competition.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Father Bids Best
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon look to instigate the other buyers and sneak through the melee. Rene brings his father, Gunter, to the auction, resulting in laughs and profits. Dave has his sights set on a big score. Ivy hits the auctions hard despite an injury.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Fat Lady Is Warming Up
programme.desc: An auction in Van Nuys, California, brings the buyers out for one more chance at hidden treasure.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Stakes, Buys, and Video Games
programme.desc: The buyers squeeze the City of Orange for some incredible lockers. Ivy scores a hole in one thanks to a unique landscaping tool. Darrell's keen eyes lead him to some upscale finds. Rene comes across a video game cache.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Goodness, Gracious, Great Coats of Fire
programme.desc: Moreno Valley gives Darrell a chance to school his friend in Daredevil-ing; Dave's fortunes go up in flames; Brandi and Jarrod dive back in, only they hit the bottom.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bright Lights, Big Biddies
programme.desc: Dave augments his inventory with a surprise medical device. Rene finds his furniture locker enlightening. Ivy finds some unexpected green.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Who Wants to Be a Mil-li-ner?
programme.desc: Costa Mesa offers Rene a bit of unexpected 'high' tech; Darrell goes on a cross-cultural haberdashery journey; Kenny kick-starts his career with some 'hot' pockets.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Granny Get Your Gun
programme.desc: Ivy can't get enough from Montebello. Dave gets a taste of carnival fun. Jarrod and Brandi shred vintage style.

programme.title: Storage Wars: That's the Way the Terra Cotta Crumbles
programme.desc: Kenny finds some relief in a unit; Brandi and Mary join forces; Dave stumbles across an historic find.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Happiness is a Warm Laser Gun
programme.desc: Mary finally manages to find a vintage goodie in El Monte. Ivy uncovers some decades-old family fun. Darrell revisits a childhood pastime.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Value of the Dolls
programme.desc: Jarrod finds the Party Locker he's always wanted. Rene discovers a new mobile business opportunity. Ivy's footwear makes a huge impact.

programme.title: Storage Wars: L. Ron Yuuuper
programme.desc: Ivy tries to get his hands on some vintage outdoor accessories. Dave finds his way into an unexpected audit, and Emily’s departure ruins one buyer’s day.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Hang 'Em High Desert
programme.desc: The buyers return to the high desert, where one discovers an antique toy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A Civil Accordion
programme.desc: The buyers make a trip to the City of Industry, where Dave Hester gets industrial and profitable.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A Time to Kiln
programme.desc: The buyers head out to rainy San Jacinto, California, where Darrell discovers something that is music to his ears. Brandi and Jarrod find they need to team up with Barry if they want to make any money. Nabila tries to expand her territory.

programme.title: Storage Wars: LBC U LTR
programme.desc: Ivy is racing against time to score a locker and get home; otherwise, he'll be in the doghouse. Rene spends the most money of anyone, but it's Darrell and Brandon who paint their way to success.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Emperor of El Monte
programme.desc: The buyers head to El Monte, California, where they take the local competition head-on. Darrell and Brandon score some antique loot, while Jarrod and Brandi get a rocking good locker. Ivy hits a score that may just lead to the mother lode.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Zen Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: Rene is being groomed to take over the competition, while Ivy learns a lesson that changes his tune about locker buying.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Unmotivational Speaker

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: No Man's Land
programme.desc: It's fall in the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge, and that means animals are on the move. Heimo pursues the tail end of the caribou migration, a bear ransacks Bob's cabin, destroying 2 years of dry meat, and the Lewis family arrives to sign of moose.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Hunted
programme.desc: Surviving 400 miles from civilization boils down to one thing, finding food. Heimo pursues a moose, which can feed him and Edna for months. The condition of Bob's boat threatens the hunt. The Seldens arrive to a flooded cabin.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Arctic Refuge: No Time to Waste
programme.desc: Winter brings unforgiving temperatures that slow time for preparation. Bob must handle the aftermath of his plane crash, Heimo is determined to begin trapping season, and Ray and his daughters set out to hunt for much needed meat.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Harrowing Homesteads
programme.desc: When harsh conditions strike Hawaii, the Raneys must help two homesteaders struggling to keep their dream home above water. In Oregon, fire constantly looms on a family's homestead and the Raneys must show them how to work together.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Reptiles of the Deep: Saurians
programme.desc: The Irwins travel to the waters off Jamaica, Vanuatu and Queensland, Australia, to swim mere inches from the massive jaws of the reptiles that inhabit these deep ocean waters. Steve and Terri search the Galapagos Islands for marine iguanas.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Steve and the Dragon
programme.desc: Steve Irwin comes face-to-face with the largest living lizard in the world, the Komodo dragon, on the remote islands of Indonesia. These huge powerful reptiles seem lazy and docile, most of the time.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Forces of Nature
programme.desc: Steve joins the U.S. military for a wild experience on the flightline in F-15s and F-16s. He works with the Rangers to remove venomous snakes from harm's way.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Trials of Parenting
programme.desc: Baby flamingo Marley's mom has lost interest in mothering duties leaving dad, Rum, to rear the baby alone. Parenting duties are normally shared equally by flamingo parents, but Rum will have to do the work of two parents if his son is going to endure.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Penguin House Hunters
programme.desc: Humboldt penguins Almond and Walnut go house hunting, but an intruder is eyeing up their turf.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Macaw 911
programme.desc: Matriarch giraffe Dagmar is ready to give birth after a 15-month pregnancy. An orangutan family who was spared when fire ripped through their habitat attempts to resume normal life, while zookeepers try to wrangle a rogue macaw who flew the coop.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Elephant Dynamics
programme.desc: Zookeepers send an SOS to the vet when members of their large otter family develop bald patches. A pair of young flamingos may have their bromance split up by an injury, while elephant Anjan mourns the loss of his siblings and acts out for attention.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Birthing Journey
programme.desc: Matriarch giraffe Dagmar helps prepare her sister Orla for an overdue birth. Tragopan pheasant Wendy is a mom-to-be but struggles to incubate her eggs, while spider monkey Faye prepares to give birth again after losing offspring in years past.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Young bongo Moti is in his prime and the keepers prepare him to mate. Aquarium staff grow concerned when they discover pinstripe damba fish George in distress, and silver gibbon Rayya mimics older brother Eko's every move.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: A Deer Family Welcome
programme.desc: On Chimpanzee Island, a new generation of males emerge, jeopardizing chimp Dylan's 15-year reign. Then, it's survival of the fittest for Indian mudskipper fish Danny versus alpha male Arnie, while deer Serena and Odin welcome their second doe.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Mauled in the Mountains
programme.desc: Louie van Grootel is working in the Canadian wilderness when he's attacked by a massive grizzly bear. In Colorado, Travis Kauffman is trail-running and comes face to face with a hungry mountain lion.

programme.title: 10 Things You Don't Know About: Pablo Escobar
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was Colombia's king of cocaine, a man his own government was afraid to touch. But he also violated the dead, set fire to millions in cash to keep warm and actually helped the US hunt down Osama Bin Laden.

programme.title: 10 Things You Don't Know About: J. Edgar Hoover
programme.desc: Edgar Hoover ran the FBI for almost 40 years and was America's most respected, and feared, lawman. Hoover was also a neighbourhood peeping tom, a sexual blackmailer, and created the world's first Gay Spy Ring.

programme.title: FBI's Most Wanted: Miami Gold Truck Heist
programme.desc: In 2015, three gunmen detonated a noxious gas inside an 18-wheeler carrying millions of dollars in gold bars. The Violent Crimes Task Force at the FBI's Miami's division is searching for the crew's ringleader, who still holds most of the stolen gold.

programme.title: FBI's Most Wanted: Cantina Cartel

programme.title: The Rise and Fall of El Chapo

programme.title: America's Greatest Prison Breaks

programme.title: Inside Alcatraz: Legends of the Rock

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Examine true-crime stories of victims found buried in the most unsuspecting of places.

programme.desc: For a day that ended so tragically, it started with roses. Nathan and Denise Leuthold had known each other since grade school. Together they built their family on faith, but in a flash, one of them was dead and the other was under suspicion.

programme.title: Snapped: Cindy McKay
programme.desc: The discovery of a victim's burning body disrupts the peace one February night and puts investigators on the trail of an elusive criminal whose desire for financial gain led to murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Nanette Litherland

programme.desc: While Antonio continues his off-duty security job for Asher and Layla, Asher is killed. Voight works the case while making sure Antonio is covered and Halstead and Lindsay go undercover in a rather uncomfortable location.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Docks
programme.desc: As Antonio's life is now in question, Voight and Platt open up about their pasts. Jin is caught while tinkering with Voight's computer and uses the only scapegoat possible to keep him in the clear.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Husbands and Knives

programme.title: The Simpsons: Smoke on the Daughter

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar, We Have a Problem
programme.desc: For real-life astronauts Suni and Leland, space travel is a breeze compared to getting their dogs to play nice. Then, Cesar meets Mongo, a pit-mix doubling as an escape artist.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Shadow Dogs
programme.desc: Responsible for handling search and rescue dogs, Marcy and Nick know that canine obedience can mean the difference between life and death. But German shepherd pups Neco and Yona have a shadowy track record.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Grizzly Dogs
programme.desc: Nat Geo WILD host Casey Anderson and wife, actress Missi Pyle cant get a handle on her two dogs. So they enlist the help of Cesar Millan.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Honeymoon Hell
programme.desc: Cesar helps actress Rhona Mitra curb her bulldog Oscar's violent tendencies. Later, newlyweds Lisa and Paul hope Cesar can sort out the canine conundrum that has cut their honeymoon short.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Back to the Suture
programme.desc: In this enhanced episode, Dr. Pol has a need for speed.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Un-Bee-lievable
programme.desc: The local animals are abuzz with the warmer weather.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Freezin' Pol'd
programme.desc: Arctic temperatures won't slow the vets down when an animal's in need.

programme.title: Africa's Great Rift: Kingdom of the Cheetah
programme.desc: The animal kingdom - Africa's wilderness abounds in the Great Rift Valley. The Serengeti is a plateau in the borderland between Kenya and Tanzania, grassland made possible by the fertile soil that resulted from the Rift Valley's wild volcanic era.

programme.title: Puma!
programme.desc: In the Torres del Paine National Park, a family of pumas are followed during parts of their daily life.

programme.title: Tiger Wars
programme.desc: The Bandhavgarh Tiger Reserve in central India is home to tigress Bacchi and her new litter of cubs, as well as her now grown-up son, B1. The massively powerful B1 has a rivalry with his grandfather, an old tiger who was once a ruler of the jungle.

programme.title: How It's Made: Upright Pianos, Flags, Wet/ Dry Vacs, Medieval Axes
programme.desc: See how upright pianos, flags, wet/ dry vacs and medieval axes are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Thai Barbecues; Diving Masks and Fins; Bassoons
programme.desc: This episode includes Thai barbecues, diving masks and fins, and bassoons.

programme.title: How It's Made: Rubber Balls, Motion Chairs, Smoked Meat, and Motorized Scooters
programme.desc: Items featured today: rubber balls; motion chairs; Montreal smoked meat; and motorized scooters.

programme.title: How It's Made: Cotton, Rodeo Roping Chutes, Asian Noodles and Rotary Engines
programme.desc: Features cotton, rodeo roping chutes, Asian noodles and rotary engines.

programme.title: How It's Made: Race Car Oil Tanks, Plaster Moldings, Lemongrass Oil, and Fly-Tying Vises
programme.desc: Featured: race car oil tanks; plastic mouldings; lemongrass oil; fly tying vises.

programme.title: How It's Made: Handmade Hammers, Gummy Vitamins, Boat Trailers, Tea Lights & Jar Candles
programme.desc: We find out how handmade hammers, gummy vitamins, boat trailers, and tea lights and jar candles are made.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the Vanished City
programme.desc: The Olmecs mysteriously vanished hundreds of years after founding their mighty ancient metropolis, and now, new evidence reveals how they may have laid a foundation for the entire Mesoamerican civilization and why they suddenly disappeared.

programme.title: Lost Pyramid of the Aztecs: The Invasion
programme.desc: A new cutting edge archaeological investigation beneath Mexico City unearths long-lost secrets of the Aztec empire and may reveal new evidence of how this powerful civilization lived and were ultimately destroyed by Spanish invaders.

programme.title: Lost Pyramid of the Aztecs: Rise of the Empire
programme.desc: For centuries, archaeologists have sought to understand the Aztecs and how they built their remarkable empire, and now, new discoveries may reveal the truth about the origins of this ancient civilization and their astonishing achievements.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Blood Pyramids
programme.desc: Giant pyramids at a strange site in Mexico are revealing the bloody secrets of a mysterious civilization that vanished 1,400 years ago. Little is known about this lost culture, but new discoveries are uncovering shocking evidence of human sacrifice.

programme.title: Lost Pyramid of the Aztecs: The Invasion
programme.desc: A new cutting edge archaeological investigation beneath Mexico City unearths long-lost secrets of the Aztec empire and may reveal new evidence of how this powerful civilization lived and were ultimately destroyed by Spanish invaders.

programme.title: Lost Pyramid of the Aztecs: Rise of the Empire
programme.desc: For centuries, archaeologists have sought to understand the Aztecs and how they built their remarkable empire, and now, new discoveries may reveal the truth about the origins of this ancient civilization and their astonishing achievements.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Jungle Treasure
programme.desc: The discovery of strange giant stone heads in the Mexican jungle leads archaeologists to the lost capital city of the Olmec, and new investigations reveal evidence that the secret knowledge of these mysterious people changed life in the Americas forever.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Ice Fortress
programme.desc: Images of earth from space reveal an intimate portrait of human activity; Cities glow bright while the wilderness remains dark; Why the Australian outback is lit up like a series of vast cities.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Mummy Desert
programme.desc: New evidence could reveal the remains of an ancient Roman city thought to be lost forever. Strange images from a remote and empty desert could explain the mysterious mummies found there. An apocalyptic sandstorm swallows the Middle East.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mafia Ghost Ship
programme.desc: A ghost ship with links to the mob suddenly appears on a California beach. Strange markings could be a coded message that reveals a plot to overthrow the Queen of England. A lake believed to have magical healing powers holds clues to life on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of Fang Forest
programme.desc: A strange forest of razor-sharp stones could be home of an undiscovered Hobbit-like humanoid species. When a man-made island mysteriously appears off the US coast, grisly new evidence points to secret government experiments into psycho-chemical warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Stonehenge
programme.desc: A mysterious Stonehenge-like structure in Russia might have links to the Nazis. Experts uncover clues to a mega-tsunami with the power to devastate the United States. A huge lake appears in the Sahara overnight, and its explanation could be mythical.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Spacetime
programme.desc: Spacetime, the secret structure that controls our universe, is a strange four-dimensional substance that controls time, light, and energy, and will also determine how our universe will end.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dawn of Life
programme.desc: We're on the verge of uncovering the how life on Earth came to be. Our origin is a hotly contested scientific debate.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How Black Holes Made Us
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that Black holes might have been essential to creating stars, giving light, and building the universe itself, and aren't the violent monsters we think they are.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Battle of the Dark Universe
programme.desc: Dark matter and dark energy compete for control of the cosmos; the winner will determine the fate of the universe. New discoveries might reveal which force will emerge victorious.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past, and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of strange alien worlds that came before us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strange Lives of Dwarf Planets
programme.desc: Our solar system is home to hundreds of strange, tiny worlds called dwarf planets, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Cassini's Final Secrets
programme.desc: For twenty years, NASA's Cassini spacecraft revealed the strange secrets of Saturn until it vaporized in its atmosphere in a blaze of glory. Today its legacy lives on, as fresh data from the probe helps scientists make brand-new discoveries.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: When a young family suddenly vanishes from their Southern California dream home, friends and family are left with dozens of unanswered questions. Authorities suspect they fled the country, until an unlikely source uncovers the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Oklahoma Horror Story
programme.desc: Just before Thanksgiving in Oklahoma City, a husband and wife are at home when two masked gunmen allegedly ambush them and kill the husband. With few leads, police use ballistics, forensics and neighborhood gossip to solve this cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Gone in 90 Seconds
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old Arizona girl vanishes while waiting for an ice cream truck, it's clear she's been abducted. The search for her leads to a trail of suspects, making it the largest missing child investigation in Arizona history.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He's Back
programme.desc: When Natalie Purdie moves from New York City to Norfolk, Virginia, she quickly makes new friends both on and off her high school dance squad. But as Natalie's life revolves around dance, she has no idea a violent obsession revolves around her.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Shelia Dates and her daughter Regina are more than blood relatives: they're best friends and roommates too. But one morning, their lives are irrevocably changed the moment two unexpected guests appear at their doorstep.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Living In Fear
programme.desc: With her big heart and generous spirit, Michelle Cable is the rock of her family; her kids Billy, Jessica, and Josh are the center of her world. But Michelle's soft spot for troubled men leaves her vulnerable to evil intentions and deadly consequences.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Danger in Store
programme.desc: After a bad breakup, single mom Joi Partain finds love again with Jonathan Pearson. But after the couple moves to Ocala, Florida with Joi's daughter, troubles in their relationship spiral until they hit a bloody, brutal point of no return.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Shelia Dates and her daughter Regina are more than blood relatives: they're best friends and roommates too. But one morning, their lives are irrevocably changed the moment two unexpected guests appear at their doorstep.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Living In Fear
programme.desc: With her big heart and generous spirit, Michelle Cable is the rock of her family; her kids Billy, Jessica, and Josh are the center of her world. But Michelle's soft spot for troubled men leaves her vulnerable to evil intentions and deadly consequences.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Come With Me
programme.desc: After a failed relationship, 22-year-old Jennifer Hitchcock thinks she may have finally found that special someone when she meets Maurice Mason. But as soon as Maurice moves in, she can't help but feel as though someone is watching her every move.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: It's love at first sight for 19-year-old Ashleigh Lindsey when she is introduced to Josh Mahaffey by his roommate Scott. But when she decides to move in with her new man, it soon becomes clear there's not room for all three of them under one roof.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Children of the Scorn
programme.desc: The Pacific Northwest may be full of gloomy weather, but one local family sees only rainbows. Three generations of an established household appear to have it all until a stash of guns and a secret video reveals the face of a diabolical killer.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: A Killing in Rotation
programme.desc: police are called to a horrific scene after a fire reveals charred fragments of a human corpse.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Gone
programme.desc: Claiming to be desperate to find the missing mother of his child, a Texas man talks with Dr. Phil, but within hours he tells police a much different story.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: In 1960, a woman told her family she was going to church for confession but she never returned. Five days later, her body was found dumped in a canal, investigators questioned hundreds of people but kept turning to Father Feit as being the murderer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in Aspen
programme.desc: When an Aspen legend who once dated Jack Nicholson and Michael Douglas is killed in her sleep, everyone in the upscale resort town wants to know why and who did it.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Exposed
programme.desc: When young professional Hannah moves into the house of her dreams, her privacy is shattered after a mysterious man begins filming her through her window. As his obsessive and threatening behavior escalates, she gambles on a violent confrontation.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Cross Your Heart and Hope to Die
programme.desc: Sarah is dating a young, handsome pastor but soon discovers her preacher man is hiding unholy secrets on a biblical scale. He is prepared to silence Sarah and her whole family to stop her leaving him.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Beauty in the Bronx
programme.desc: Evimer, a beautiful young woman afraid of love, meets a handsome stranger who she soon falls deeply for. But his charm turns to violent jealousy and Ramon becomes convinced that if he cannot have Evie, nobody can.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Burning Love
programme.desc: Yvette and Roger's marriage has broken down but Roger can't stand to see Yvette with another man and decides she must die -- in front of all her colleagues. If he can't have her, then no one will.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seeking Out Maple
programme.desc: In the early hours of September 28th, 2011, student Maple Batalia is found shot dead in the parking lot of Simon Fraser University.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Vanishing Nurse
programme.desc: Bright young nursing student Michelle Le vanishes without a trace. An old friend of hers points a finger at Michelle's ex-boyfriend. Cops discover footage that shows Michelle's car driving around the parking lot where she vanished, but who is the driver?

programme.title: See No Evil: A Date with Dalene
programme.desc: On August 6th 2011, Dalene Carlson vanishes during a Saturday night on the town. Security footage from a local bar reveals a number of potential suspects, each with a motive.

programme.title: See No Evil: Captured on Camera
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, a 22-year-old nursing assistant vanishes. When police check the local CCTV footage, they discover that Carlesha Freeland-Gaither was violently abducted right on camera.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Take Down My Ex-Boyfriend
programme.desc: Donna Schatz went on the run after carrying out a violent vendetta on her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be a Ladies' Man
programme.desc: David Corbin is a career criminal. After a stint in prison, Corbin launches a crime wave, stealing cars and selling them for a profit. But when a jealous girlfriend rats him out, Corbin is caught and sent to prison where he pulls off a daring escape.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fall in Love With a Prison Guard
programme.desc: Terry Banks is in prison for life. When he falls for a guard named Lynette, he's determined to break free to start a life with her. She helps him escape and they go on the run. But when the FBI tracks them down, will they commit another desperate act?

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Meth Lab
programme.desc: Jerry Wright built up a booming meth business in the hills of Tennessee until his lab blew up.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob Banks
programme.desc: Joe Loya is a professional bank robber, addicted to the adrenaline of power. After 13 months of successful robberies, Loya's luck runs out when one robbery goes wrong. It's the latest in bank technology that leads investigators to Loya and ends his spree.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Ninth Place at Poker
programme.desc: Randall Zandstra shot his ex-wife's boyfriend and got 12 years in jail. Due to a technicality, there was a retrial. Zandstra fled, ran to Vegas, winning big in poker and running mail fraud. Authorities finally track him down and he is now in a NJ prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Revenge
programme.desc: Marshall Brown was 19 when he committed his first contract killing. A drug dealer put a hit out on Horace Morrison. Brown was soon convicted and spent the next 19 years in prison planning his escape. This is the story of his life on the run.

programme.desc: Jerry Wright built up a booming meth business in the hills of Tennessee until his lab blew up.
